body:
sapphic-dice:

Reading reblogs from TERFs and detransitioners and 4chaners doesn’t “cure me” of my “transgenderism”.

Doesn’t make me renounce my supposed idiocy and appropriation of womanhood.


Cause simply.


They’re sad people, living pained lives, who want everyone to be as miserable as they are without possessing an ounce of understanding and empathy.


But I’m not gonna be the one able to fix their mindset. Make them realize the foolishness of the vitriol they speak.


So, I simply block them and move on.


It doesn’t hurt. I just feel sad for them.
